title: DependencyGraph e import graph Python
wave: Ola 4 — Repo intelligence y revisión industrial

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-36 agrega un analizador estático local basado en AST, sin dependencias externas, sin red, sin APIs, sin ejecución de código analizado, sin UI, sin sandbox real y sin acciones destructivas. Mantiene la arquitectura local-first y read-only de Fase C.

pass_criteria: DependencyGraph extracts Python imports using AST without executing analyzed code.
The graph reports nodes, edges, fan-in and fan-out metrics.
External imports are separated from internal dependency edges.
Syntax errors produce controlled findings instead of crashes.
The CLI returns CommandResult and supports --json/--write-report.
MIASI declares repo.dependency_graph as a read-only tool.
block_criteria: The analyzer imports or executes code under analysis.
The analyzer follows paths outside the workspace.
The command calls network, external APIs or models.
A Python syntax error crashes the command.
Sprint 36 is documented as semantic SAST/SCA or runtime call graph certainty.
risks: Dynamic imports and runtime plugin loading are not fully detected.
Import edges are not equivalent to runtime call relationships.
Large repositories may require additional limits and pagination.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-37 — RepoAnalyzer v2: estructura, riesgos y salud del repositorio
